title: Tangy Flaky Paleo Friendly Polish Dish
description: A tangy and flaky paleo-friendly twist on the classic Polish dish featuring Chinese five spice powder for a hangover cure.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt and black pepper.

Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Add avocado oil, then place chicken in skillet skin-side down. Cook for about 4 minutes until golden brown on one side. Flip and continue cooking until fully cooked through, approximately 6-8 more minutes total.
In another pan, sauté zucchini noodles with salt and pepper until tender, about 2-3 minutes.
Drizzle honey and lemon juice over chicken to add tanginess, then sprinkle Chinese five spice powder on top. Bake in preheated oven for 10-15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Serve immediately with a garnish of fresh dill.
